Dear [Customer Name],

To proceed, please click the link below to verify your account details:  
[https://www.bank.com/verify-account](https://www.bank.com/verify-account)  

Your account number: [123456789]  
Your last transaction date: [October 10, 2023]  

Please ensure you are on a secure connection and do not share this link with anyone.  

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.  

Best regards,  
[Bank Name] Customer Support  

---

2. **Check for red flags**: Phishing emails often have poor grammar, urgent language, or suspicious links. Avoid clicking on links or downloading attachments from unknown sources.

3. **Use multi-factor authentication (MFA)**: This adds an extra layer of security to your accounts and makes it harder for attackers to access your information.

4. **Educate yourself and others**: Stay informed about the latest phishing tactics and share this knowledge with friends, family, and colleagues.
